mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_travel_note WHERE status = 1
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
SELECT n.*, u.username, u.nickname FROM t_travel_note n LEFT JOIN t_user u ON n.user_id = u.user_id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.status != 2 ORDER BY n.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_travel_note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 2
mapper.update: UPDATE t_travel_note SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
UPDATE t_travel_note SET like_count = like_count + #{delta} WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND like_count + #{delta} >= 0
UPDATE t_travel_note SET comment_count = comment_count + #{delta} WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND comment_count + #{delta} >= 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_travel_note (user_id, title, content, cover_image, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{status})
mapper.delete: UPDATE t_travel_note SET status = 2 WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_travel_note
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
